summary: KYC/AML Compliance Layer and Dynamic NENO Pricing features fully tested. 15/15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend components verified: KYC status page with tier info, KYC form submission, Admin KYC review tab, AML alerts tab with stats, NENO Exchange with dynamic pricing display. Fixed admin role check (case-insensitive comparison). Margin Trading page still working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: KYC tiers correctly implemented: 0=Non Verificato (0 EUR), 1=Base (1000 EUR/day), 2=Verificato (50000/day), 3=Premium (unlimited)
AML thresholds working: 10000 EUR single tx alert, 25000 EUR daily velocity, 5 tx/hour structuring detection
Dynamic NENO pricing: base 10000 EUR, adjusts based on 24h buy/sell volume with max 5% deviation
Admin role check fixed to be case-insensitive (ADMIN vs admin)
All UI labels in Italian as requested
KYC document verification is MOCKED (manual admin review)
seed_data_creation: Test user KYC approved to Tier 2 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: KYC/AML Compliance Layer fully implemented at /kyc route. KYC tiers 0-3 with daily limits. Admin can review pending KYC applications and manage AML alerts. Dynamic NENO pricing at /neno-exchange uses order book pressure to adjust price within 5% of base (10000 EUR). Margin Trading at /margin still working with professional candlestick charts.

mocked_apis.kyc_document_verification: KYC document verification is manual (admin review) - no automated ID verification

kyc_backend.GET /api/kyc/status: PASS - returns tier, tier_label, status, daily_limit, daily_used, can_trade, can_withdraw
kyc_backend.GET /api/kyc/admin/pending: PASS - returns pending KYC applications (admin only)
kyc_backend.GET /api/kyc/aml/stats: PASS - returns open_alerts, escalated, blocked_users, total_alerts

neno_pricing_backend.GET /api/neno-exchange/price: PASS - returns dynamic price with buy/sell volume, shift_pct, net_pressure
neno_pricing_backend.GET /api/neno-exchange/quote: PASS - uses dynamic pricing for buy/sell quotes

kyc_frontend.page_load: PASS - /kyc loads with KYC / AML Compliance header
kyc_frontend.status_tab: PASS - Shows tier, tier_label, daily_limit, daily_used, can_trade, can_withdraw
kyc_frontend.tier_roadmap: PASS - Shows all 4 tiers with limits
kyc_frontend.submit_tab: PASS - KYC form with personal info, address, document fields
kyc_frontend.admin_review_tab: PASS - Shows pending KYC applications with approve/reject/request_info buttons
kyc_frontend.aml_alerts_tab: PASS - Shows AML stats and open alerts

neno_exchange_frontend.page_load: PASS - /neno-exchange loads with NeoNoble Exchange header
neno_exchange_frontend.dynamic_price: PASS - Shows Prezzo $NENO with dynamic price
neno_exchange_frontend.quote_preview: PASS - Shows Prezzo NENO, Tasso, Fee, Costo totale
neno_exchange_frontend.asset_selection: PASS - EUR, BNB, ETH, USDT, BTC, USDC, MATIC, USD

margin_trading_frontend.page_load: PASS - /margin loads with professional candlestick chart
margin_trading_frontend.chart: PASS - BTC-EUR candlestick chart with volume indicator
margin_trading_frontend.trading_panel: PASS - LONG/SHORT buttons, leverage selector, quantity input

dashboard_integration.kyc_card: PASS - KYC / AML card with 'Verifica identita e compliance' text

fixes_applied.issue: Admin role check was case-sensitive (checking for 'admin' but backend returns 'ADMIN')
